comment: Closed defect taxonomy (spec Appendix B). Single source of truth: the vision tool schema enum and the prompt taxonomy list are generated from this file. severity: default gate level; table_fix: fix id in fixes.json or null (null => escalation/LLM param patch path); resume_stage: earliest pipeline stage that must re-run after the fix (G=generate, M=material/bake, B=background/sky, X=export).

NON_MANIFOLD.definition: Edges shared by !=2 faces (or wire edges) on a closed-topology mesh

LOOSE_GEOMETRY.definition: Vertices with no edges or edges with no faces

INVERTED_NORMALS.definition: Face normals pointing inward / inconsistent winding

SELF_INTERSECTION.definition: Non-adjacent faces of the same mesh intersecting beyond threshold

OVER_BUDGET.definition: Triangle count above the platform-profile budget

UNDER_BUDGET.definition: Triangle count below the category minimum (degenerate output)

BBOX_OUT_OF_RANGE.definition: Bounding box outside the recipe's declared real-world size range

SOCKET_OFF_GRID.definition: Modular-kit snap socket not on the 0.5 m grid within 0.1 mm

SKIN_WEIGHT_INVALID.definition: Vertex with >4 bone influences, non-normalized weights, or orphaned (max weight < 0.1)

UV_MISSING.definition: Faces without UV coordinates or with zero UV area

UV_OVERLAP.definition: UV island overlap above threshold fraction of shell area

UV_OUT_OF_BOUNDS.definition: UVs outside [0,1] on a non-tiling surface

UV_STRETCH.definition: Texel-density non-uniformity or conformal stretch above threshold

BAKE_MARGIN_LOW.definition: UV island spacing below the required bake-bleed gutter

TEX_RESOLUTION_INVALID.definition: Texture not square power-of-two, or above profile budget, or below 64 px

TEX_FORMAT_INVALID.definition: Wrong file format, bit depth, color-space tag, or stray alpha channel

BLACK_SURFACE.definition: Surface renders black / albedo statistically empty where a real material is expected

MISSING_TEXTURE.definition: Referenced texture absent, unlinked, or replaced by placeholder

NORMAL_MAP_INVALID.definition: Normal map fails sanity stats (mean blue < 0.7, wrong swizzle, sRGB-baked)

ORM_INVALID.definition: ORM channel statistics outside recipe declaration (noise blowout, metallic mass wrong)

TILING_SEAM.definition: Tiling texture edges mismatch or visible grid repetition on tiled render

VISIBLE_SEAM.definition: Visible UV-seam discontinuity in albedo/shading on continuous geometry

CLIPPED_EMISSIVE.definition: Emissive regions blowing out to full white and losing detail

SCALE_IMPLAUSIBLE.definition: Apparent size vs 1 m reference implausible for the described object

SILHOUETTE_MISMATCH.definition: Object does not read as the requested type/theme from its silhouette

MATERIAL_IMPLAUSIBLE.definition: Material response physically implausible (metal reads as plastic, mirror-like stone, dead emissive)

PALETTE_VIOLATION.definition: Dominant surface colors outside the theme palette or using forbidden hues

SHADING_ARTIFACT.definition: Faceting on smooth surfaces, blocky shadows, or smeared texels

ZFIGHT_COPLANAR.definition: Coplanar overlapping faces producing z-fighting patterns

FLOATING_PART.definition: Sub-part visibly disconnected from the asset body

INTERPENETRATION.definition: Sub-parts intersecting implausibly (beyond intentional greeble sinking)

MISSING_PART.definition: An expected functional part is absent (handle attached to nothing, etc.)

POLE_PINCH.definition: Equirect skybox pinching/swirl artifacts at zenith or nadir

HORIZON_SEAM.definition: Skybox horizontal wrap seam or discontinuous horizon

GLTF_EXTENSION_FORBIDDEN.definition: glTF extension outside the canonical whitelist

FILE_TOO_LARGE.definition: Canonical .glb above the profile file-size cap

RENDER_EMPTY.definition: A verification render is empty/solid/garbage (A1 failure)

INFRA_ERROR.definition: Infrastructure failure (subprocess crash, timeout, corrupt file) - not an asset defect
